settings.title: Terms of sale.
settings.lead: These points summarise how we expect orders to work. They are not a substitute for legal advice. A fuller terms document may be published later.
settings.body:
Orders and pricing

Product descriptions, prices, and availability can change. The price and terms on your confirmed order or invoice are the ones that apply to that purchase.

Payment

We accept the methods shown at checkout or agreed for your account (for example Paystack, transfer, or other channels we confirm). Orders move to processing after we confirm payment where required.

Delivery

Delivery timelines are estimates and depend on couriers and location. Risk of loss passes as set out in your order communication or carrier terms.

Contact

For disputes or questions, contact us first through Contact or WhatsApp so we can resolve things quickly.
